response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering skills and 20 years of development experience, this specialized role requires expertise in embedded networking security and fluent Japanese—both of which are absent from the resume. The role's focus on security features (MACsec, 802.1X, device authentication) has no counterpart in a career trajectory dominated by web and application development. Additionally, relevant embedded systems and C experience is now 10+ years outdated, with recent work in TypeScript/Node.js web development.
strengths: 20 years of proven software development across multiple platforms and languages with demonstrated mastery of software craftsmanship principles
Strong track record of learning new domains and technologies; ability to contribute across full technology stacks
Leadership in testing and code quality practices (TDD, CI/CD) with community involvement through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency is explicitly required but entirely absent from resume
No demonstrated expertise in networking security technologies, protocols (SNMP, NETCONF), or embedded security implementations
Embedded systems and C programming experience (2014-2015) is over 10 years outdated; career has shifted to web and application development

key_factors.factor: Native-level Japanese language requirement not addressed
No background in embedded networking security domain
Embedded C and firmware expertise significantly outdated
